title: Compact Honeycomb
description: Changes the honeycomb block craft and let's you decraft it back into honeycombs.
body:
### Compact Honeycomb
This data pack changes the official honeycomb block craft from 4 honeycombs to 9.
In return, you can now uncraft honeycomb blocks into regular honeycomb items.
This let's you store them more efficiently, which is useful considering the new waxable blocks coming up in 1.21.


![nine honeycombs being crafted into a honeycomb block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4929b1b25e6505ed6a84fa6fe5ce1433b0f83516.png)

![honeycomb block being uncrafted into nine honeycombs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/147c361b5fd50e632ebe0d4c43026491277a1638.png)
